synopsis:
Lando Calrissian and Luke Skywalker arrive at the gigantic merchant station Bazarre to meet a shifty administrator named Orion Ferret. Lando has dealt with Ferret before and does not trust him, but they need his connections to secure four black-market Imperial TIE fighters. After taking his payment, Ferret lends them a shuttle programmed with coordinates for Patch-4, a garbage world where the fighters have been hidden. Luke and Lando leave Chewbacca on the station and fly out to the planet of trash.

With them gone, Ferret tries to sabotage the mission, reasoning that killing the pair lets him keep the money, the fighters, and the *Millennium Falcon*. To keep Chewbacca from interfering, he imprisons the Wookiee in a gelatinous spritzer solution, but Chewbacca escapes, chases him across the station, and disables his getaway shuttle with his bowcaster. On Patch-4, Luke and Lando dig out the half-buried TIE fighters and are attacked by a giant worm-like Watchbeast. Retreating into a network of tunnels, they meet a homeless nomad named Serja Kesselrook and a colony of renegades who have made the trash world their home. Serja explains that the Watchbeast, Ceasar, belongs to Ferret, who controls it with a sonic pacifier aboard the shuttle. Luke sneaks past the beast while Lando distracts it, retrieves the pacifier, and lulls the creature to sleep. They pick up Chewbacca and bring the four TIE fighters back to the Rebel base on Arbra.
title: Star Wars (1977) #59: Bazarre
